title: Just a goofy Mod
description:
This Mod adds a lot of things that I believe you will enjoy for example it adds, bosses, mobs, new weapons, new items, and a new biome!
(This is a Beta Mod and there we be more updates soon, Hopefully.
A lot of this mod was inspired "ImNotaCasualty".)
body: Just a goofy mod adds things I'm sure you will love like, A Glock 19, New Bosses, New Biome, Custom Items, and much more! Things like the Glock 19 adds new ways to pvp/pve that make the game much more fun! And you will be able to explore more things if you are adventurer. And will have frequent updates if you can finish the things that this mod adds to make it endless fun! (This is a Beta Mod and will hopefully have frequent updates. This is heavily inspired by "Imnotacasuality" and created with MCreator.)
